verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Before I knew your name, You knew my every breath. Before I found my way, You knew my every step. Before I knew everything that I need, You gave it all to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No greater love than this That you should lay down your life. For someone such as me, I'd spend a lifetime wondering why. The beauty of heaven is here in my heart, And I know there can be No greater love than this.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I never understood How merciful love could be. Until I felt his flame Light every part of me. And I would give everything that I am, Cause I have been saved. Yes, I have been saved!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The beauty of heaven is here in my heart, And I know there can be No greater love than this.
